name: Vox Royalty Corp.
description: Vox Royalty Corp. is a returns-focused mining royalty and streaming company that specializes in acquiring and managing a diverse portfolio of royalties and streaming assets. The company focuses on building a high-quality, commodity-diversified portfolio across various jurisdictions, including Australia, Canada, and the United States. By providing capital to mining operators in exchange for royalty interests, Vox Royalty aims to generate long-term value for its shareholders through exposure to precious metals and other mineral production without the operational risks associated with traditional mining activities.
